Petition To Invalidate Trust Amendment For Lack Of Capacity And For Imposition Of Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Jan-04-2021 Continued To Mar-29-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Guadalupe Gamino appeared by zoom for Peter Whitcomb (Petitioner).
Lynn Searle appeared by zoom for Ken Whitcomb (Respondent).

The Court stated that there was a prior case (302527) where Mr. Gamino filed a dismissal on November 25, 2020, informed Mr. Gamino that a dismissal in Probate does not dispose of the matter and noted that he filed a new petition which is the same and requires filing of the same response. Mr. Gamino stated that the tentative ruling was that he had not submitted the order to consolidate, that on December 23rd he personally hand delivered two proposed orders and that he didn't hear anything. Mr. Gamino also stated that he was then surprised to hear that the matter was going to be taken off calendar, and that he can print up two more copies and drop them off today. In addition, Mr. Gamino stated that he plans to move forward, that he received some discovery and as a result of discovery he intends to amend to add two additional parties, and requested a 45-day continuance stating that Ms. Searle would not stipulate to filing of his amendment so he will have to file a motion. Ms. Searle stated that there has been a two-year delay with several court appearances and that her position is that Mr. Gamino's Client does not have standing and will not prevail. The Petition to Invalidate Trust Amendment for Lack of Capacity, etc. is continued to March 29, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Gamino is to file his motion as soon as possible.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition To Invalidate Trust Amendment For Lack Of Capacity And For Imposition Of Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Dec-07-2020 Continued To Jan-04-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Invalidate Trust Amendment For Lack Of Capacity And For Imposition Of Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Nov-05-2020 Continued To Dec-07-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Invalidate Trust Amendment For Lack Of Capacity And For Imposition Of Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Sep-28-2020 Continued To Nov-09-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Guadalupe Gamino appeared by zoom for Peter Whitcomb.
Lynn Searle appeared by zoom for Ken Whitcomb (Respondent).

The Court noted that the last time the Parties were before the Court it was assured by Mr. Gamino that he would provide courtesy copies of the petition. Mr. Gamino stated that he dropped the courtesy copies off of at that time, that he will hand deliver them today to the Probate Examiner's attention, that he just finished the consolidation order and that he will drop it off at the same time. Mr. Gamino also stated that notice was provided to all of the Beneficiaries and that there was an issue of a wrong address on the notice of hearing. Ms. Searle stated that her office checked with Ms. Halls, that Ms. Halls had not received a copy of the petition, that Mr. Gamino was ordered to provide a copy of the petition, and that the notice indicated that it had a copy of the petition attached, but it didn't. Mr. Gamino stated that Ms. Searles requested an additional 30-days to provide discovery responses and that the responses are due on October 29th. The Court noted that Ms. Halls did not request special notice and is not entitled to a copy of the petition, but it is a good idea to provide it. Ms. Searle stated that this has been the original issue since January of 2019, that there have been ten hearings and that this had been put over because of the Petitioner's failure to do those things. Ms. Searle also stated that there is the issue of the Petitioner not having standing, and that even if the petition were granted, he would not benefit under the trust. The Petition to Invalidate Trust Amendment, etc. is continued to November 9, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court expects the issue of the courtesy copies and the consolidation order to be taken care of.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition To Invalidate Trust Amendment For Lack Of Capacity And For Imposition Of Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Aug-10-2020 Continued To Sep-28-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Guadalupe Gamino appearing by CourtCall for Peter J. Whitcomb, Jr. (Petitioner). Lynn Searle appearing by Zoom for Kenneth Whitcomb.

The Court stated that there has been an issue getting courtesy copies. Mr. Gamino stated that things have been confusing due to the COVID pandemic, that he could not get Case No. PTR-19-302527 back on calendar, and because of that he ended up with Case No. PTR-19-303384. The Court stated that it could consolidate this case with the earlier case. The Court addressed there being no proof of service on file. Mr. Gamino stated that the petition should have been served. Ms. Searle stated that she contacted Ms. Hails after she received Case No. PTR-19-303384, that Ms. Hails informed her that she was not served with the petition, and that she filed Ms. Hails' declaration. Ms. Searle stated that the there have been multiple appearances, that the petitioner has failed to move this matter forward, and that he is not paying attention to the probate examiner's notes. Mr. Gamino stated that he does want to move the matter forward, that he can get the petition served, and noted that discovery may change their position. The Court stated that it would file an order consolidating this case with Case No. PTR-19-302527. The Court continued the Petition to Invalidate Trust to September 28, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court stated that according to Ms. Hail's declaration she got notice of the hearing but was not served with the petition.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Probate Examiner: Probate Director Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Matter not reported.
